data.education--certifications#Education \u00:
I believe in continuous learning to stay at the forefront of technology. I am currently a postgraduate student in Engineering and Software Architecture at FIA - Faculdade de Administração Paulista.
Key Certifications:
CKA: Certified Kubernetes Administrator GCP PCA: Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect GCP ACE: Google Cloud Associate Cloud Engineer HashiCorp: Terraform Associate Academic Journey:
Postgraduate Degree: Information Technology Management, UNINTER (2023) Bachelor of Science: Information Systems, Universidade Ibirapuera (2006) Academic Equivalency in the USA by Carnegie Evaluations LLC You can find me on social media:
LinkedIn GitHub Twitter/X
data.expertise--tech-stack#Expertise \u0026am:
My technical focus lies at the intersection of infrastructure and software engineering. I specialize in:
Cloud Architecture: Designing multi-region, fault-tolerant systems primarily on AWS and GCP. DevOps & SRE: Implementing CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code (Terraform), and Observability to ensure system reliability. Leadership: Mentoring talent and managing global engineering teams. Development: Proficient in Python, JavaScript, and Shell scripting. I actively contribute to the community through projects like my DevOps Toolbox and AI-powered tools like Career Advisors.
data.professional-background#Professional Bac:
Hello! I’m Wilton Paulo da Silva, a DevOps Manager and Cloud Architect based in São Paulo, Brazil. With over 20 years of experience across diverse industries, including telecommunications, banking, aerospace, health-tech and AI. I have developed a deep expertise in building resilient, scalable, and automated infrastructures.
Throughout my career, I’ve successfully led engineering teams of over six people, fostering high-performance cultures and delivering complex projects with high-quality results. I am passionate about driving innovation and finding creative solutions to the technical challenges of modern software delivery.

data: Greetings, fellow explorers of the digital frontier! Today marks an exciting chapter in my ongoing journey through the realms of blockchain technology and infrastructure automation. Allow me to share the inspiration and motivations that fueled the creation of my latest project—a convergence of exploration, learning, and hands-on experience.
data.bridging-knowledge-with-automation#Bridg: In tandem with my blockchain journey, the allure of automation beckoned. The desire to streamline and scale infrastructure operations led me to Packer and Terraform. Crafting custom virtual machines with Packer and orchestrating their deployment with Terraform on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) not only intrigued me but presented a tangible opportunity to bridge my newfound knowledge with practical implementation.
data.the-birth-of-the-project#The Birth of th: And thus, the idea was born—an endeavor to amalgamate blockchain exploration with infrastructure automation. This project, housed within the digital corridors of GitHub, aims to document and share this expedition. Whether you’re a fellow explorer or a seasoned voyager in the realms of blockchain and automation, I invite you to join me on this learning odyssey.
data.unraveling-blockchains-mysteries#Unravel: Blockchain, often heralded as the cornerstone of decentralization, has captivated my curiosity for quite some time. The promise of transparent, secure, and trustless systems has led me to delve deeper into the intricacies of this transformative technology. The choice of Avalanche as my exploration ground stems from its reputation for scalability and versatility in crafting bespoke blockchain networks.
data.why-this-post#Why This Post?:
With this inaugural post, I aim to provide insights into the genesis of this project, shedding light on the reasons behind its inception and the goals it aspires to achieve. It’s not just a project; it’s a narrative of discovery and shared knowledge.
But first, let’s set the stage with a visual representation of the journey so far:

/blockchain/.title: Exploring Blockchain and DevOps Automation with OCI
